title: 哈利波特与魔法石
title_en: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
author: J.K.罗琳
description: 哈利在十一岁生日那天得知自己是一名巫师，并进入霍格沃茨开始一段充满魔法、友情与冒险的校园生活。
description_en: Harry discovers that he is a wizard on his eleventh birthday and begins a life of friendship, mystery, and magic at Hogwarts.

title: 一九八四
author: 乔治·奥威尔
description: 温斯顿生活在一个被极权监视全面控制的世界里，试图在谎言与恐惧中保留真实的思想与记忆。
description_en: Winston Smith lives under total surveillance in a state that controls memory, language, and truth itself.

title: 傲慢与偏见
author: 简·奥斯汀
description: 伊丽莎白·班纳特在爱情、家庭与社会偏见之间，逐渐看清自己与达西先生的真实内心。
description_en: Elizabeth Bennet navigates manners, misjudgments, and family pressure as she comes to understand Mr. Darcy and herself.

title: 杀死一只知更鸟
author: 哈珀·李
description: 通过童年视角，这部小说讲述了美国南方小镇中的正义、偏见与成长。
description_en: Told through a child's eyes, the novel explores justice, prejudice, and moral courage in the American South.

title: 了不起的盖茨比
author: F. 斯科特·菲茨杰拉德
description: 在爵士时代的繁华与迷醉中，盖茨比执着追寻旧日梦想，折射出美国梦的幻灭。
description_en: Set in the Jazz Age, Gatsby's obsession with an impossible dream reveals the glamour and emptiness of the American Dream.

title: 霍比特人
author: J.R.R.托尔金
description: 比尔博·巴金斯被卷入一场寻找巨龙宝藏的冒险，也意外开启了中土世界的传奇篇章。
description_en: Bilbo Baggins is drawn into a treasure quest that becomes the beginning of one of fantasy's greatest adventures.

title: 华氏451
author: 雷·布拉德伯里
description: 在一个焚书被制度化的社会中，一名消防员开始怀疑自己所维护的一切。
description_en: In a society where books are burned, a fireman begins to question the world he has sworn to defend.

title: 小王子
author: 安托万·德·圣埃克苏佩里
description: 一位来自小星球的王子在星际旅行中，重新提醒成人关于爱、孤独与责任的意义。
description_en: A young prince travels from planet to planet and reveals timeless truths about love, loneliness, and responsibility.

title: 白鲸
author: 赫尔曼·梅尔维尔
description: 亚哈船长执着追逐白鲸莫比·迪克，这场航海故事也成为关于执念与命运的史诗。
description_en: Captain Ahab's relentless pursuit of the white whale becomes an epic meditation on obsession and fate.

title: 弗兰肯斯坦
author: 玛丽·雪莱
description: 科学家维克多创造出生命，却无法承担后果，这部作品也成为现代科幻与哥特文学经典。
description_en: Victor Frankenstein creates life and unleashes tragedy in a foundational story of science, ambition, and responsibility.

title: 罪与罚
author: 费奥多尔·陀思妥耶夫斯基
description: 拉斯柯尔尼科夫在罪行之后陷入漫长的精神折磨，小说深刻描绘了良知、贫困与救赎。
description_en: After committing murder, Raskolnikov spirals through guilt, pride, poverty, and the search for redemption.

title: 奥德赛
author: 荷马
description: 奥德修斯在特洛伊战争后历经漫长漂泊，终于踏上回归家园与身份的旅途。
description_en: Odysseus journeys home across a world of monsters, gods, and temptation in one of the foundational epics of Western literature.

title: 人类简史
author: 尤瓦尔·赫拉利
description: 这本书从认知革命、农业革命到科技革命，重新审视人类如何塑造世界与自身命运。
description_en: Harari traces the history of humankind from the cognitive revolution to the modern age and asks what made us dominant.

title: 思考，快与慢
author: 丹尼尔·卡尼曼
description: 诺奖得主卡尼曼用大量案例解释人类决策中的直觉系统与理性系统如何共同影响判断。
description_en: Kahneman explains the fast, intuitive mind and the slow, deliberate mind that shape decisions and biases.

title: 精益创业
author: 埃里克·莱斯
description: 从最小可行产品到快速验证，这本书系统总结了创业团队如何用实验方法持续迭代。
description_en: Eric Ries presents a disciplined approach to building startups through experimentation, feedback, and rapid iteration.

title: 代码整洁之道
author: 罗伯特·C·马丁
description: 围绕命名、函数、对象与测试，这本经典著作总结了编写可维护代码的核心实践。
description_en: A practical classic on naming, functions, objects, and tests that argues for software craftsmanship through readable code.

title: 程序员修炼之道
author: 安德鲁·亨特 / 大卫·托马斯
description: 本书以务实视角总结了程序员在工具使用、架构思维和职业成长上的长期方法论。
description_en: A foundational guide to practical software development, continuous learning, and thoughtful engineering habits.

title: 设计模式
author: Erich Gamma 等
description: 这本软件工程经典总结了面向对象设计中可复用的模式语言，对架构与工程实践影响深远。
description_en: The Gang of Four catalog of reusable object-oriented design patterns remains one of software engineering's most influential books.

title: Python深度学习
author: 弗朗索瓦·肖莱
description: Keras 作者以清晰示例讲解神经网络基础、计算机视觉、序列建模与深度学习实践。
description_en: Francois Chollet introduces neural networks and practical deep learning workflows with Keras and Python.

title: 原子习惯
author: 詹姆斯·克利尔
description: 围绕微小改变如何积累成巨大成果，本书给出了可执行的习惯养成与行为改变方法。
description_en: James Clear explains how tiny improvements compound into meaningful personal and professional transformation.

title: 金钱心理学
author: 摩根·豪泽尔
description: 作者通过故事与案例说明，财务决策往往不是数学问题，而是行为与情绪问题。
description_en: Morgan Housel explores how behavior, patience, and emotion shape financial outcomes more than spreadsheets do.

title: 时间简史
author: 史蒂芬·霍金
description: 霍金用通俗语言介绍宇宙起源、黑洞、时间与现代物理学中的核心问题。
description_en: Hawking presents cosmology, black holes, and the nature of time in an accessible introduction to modern physics.

title: 夏洛的网
author: E.B.怀特
description: 小猪威尔伯与蜘蛛夏洛之间真挚的友谊，让这部儿童文学作品温柔地讲述了生命与告别。
description_en: Wilbur the pig and Charlotte the spider share one of children's literature's most moving stories of friendship and loss.

title: 三体
author: 刘慈欣
description: 从文革阴影到宇宙文明接触，这部小说用宏大的科学设定讨论文明、理性与生存。
description_en: Liu Cixin blends Chinese history with cosmic-scale speculation in a landmark science fiction novel about first contact.

title: 沙丘
author: 弗兰克·赫伯特
description: 在荒漠星球厄拉科斯上，权力、宗教、生态与预言交织成一部史诗级科幻巨作。
description_en: On the desert planet Arrakis, politics, prophecy, and ecology collide in one of science fiction's defining epics.
